jobs.title: Marketing Director
jobs.description:
Advertisement Template English 

  

 Ever wondered how your skills and unique background could impact the world of tomorrow? Join our Production team and bring your passion and talent to work.

  

 Marketing Director  100% 

   

 Shanghai ,China

   

 Your contribution 

 Objective 

 Short term - As an integral part of the sales & marketing team to drive achievement of company targets

  

 Long-term - To develop robust strategic & operational marketing plans to support company

  

 Development and implementation of an effective China business development plan and marketing strategy in close coordination with the global product & strategic marketing and business units

  

 Work with sales leaders to develop and implement business process improvement and operation plan / actions and to develop and execute clear and consistent marketing strategies for products in different market segments / applications

  

 Effectively manage a marketing team consisting of application specialists / managers and Marcom Manager to formulate and drive relevant sales support activities e.g. product demonstrations, presentations, trade shows, product trainings, etc. in daily basis · 

  

 
• Responsibilities 

 
 Definition of market and sales / pricing strategies by customer segments, products and applications in collabo-ration with Global Business Units and local sales leaders to define relevant product and market strategies

 Be an important channel to regularly communicate with Global Product & Business teams on local market trends and market needs

 Work with sales leaders to develop field sales actions plan for various market segments

 Actively involve in the annual budget planning process and mid range strategic planning

 Oversee the development and production of marketing communications materials and tools e.g. brochures, advertisements, company website and trade events, etc.

 Daily management of the applications team to deliver effective sales support activities in the market

 Work with sales leaders on the development of KOL programs and retention of KOLs

 Regular report to the company on sales trend / price analysis and recommend actions for improvement

 Regular update to the company on market competition development

 Set up "new product launch" process and develop effective product launch plan to support new product launches

 Be responsible for the business performance of key products in the market. Possessing indepth knowledge about the life science research and diagnostic market segments

 Formulation and execution of marketing strategies for key products in the market

 Control and efficient use of company resources to support the achievement of sales and operational targets

 Provide coaching and supervisions for the team and develop appropriate development programs for key talents

 Drives the adoption of value-based selling across teams, ensuring alignment on customer value, and coaching managers and employees to deliver differentiated solutions.

 
      

 Your background 

 We’re not just looking for hard skills: We’re looking for people who bring their passion and talent to work.

 
 Master in Life Science subjects with equivalent 7-10 years of relevant experience

 Excellent leadership and communication skills

 Pre-launch product development skills

 Project management skills

 Fluent in both verbal and written English

 
   

   

 W hat makes working at Tecan unique 

 
 The chance to make it count and to have an impact on the world of tomorrow

 Working in an international and diverse environment

 The chance to grow your career within the company

 Feel empowered by our strong and unique company culture

 Comprehensive compensation and benefits package

 
  

 Join Tecan, a great place to work! Read about our recent certification from Great Place to Work. 

  

 We’re looking forward to receiving your application online. Please submit your CV or resume (w/o picture and w/o cover letter, reference letters and diplomas are optional).

  

 Only applications that fully meet our requirements will be considered.

   

 #lifescience #healthcare #automation #medicaldevice #biology #biotechnology # etc.  

 (add individual hashtags – related to job, education, skills) 

  

 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 Our purpose.  

At Tecan we are driven to improve people’s lives and health. We do this by empowering our customers to scale healthcare innovation globally from life science to the clinic. We collaborate with our customers from early-stage innovation through project implementation and beyond. We deliver the products, services and solutions that make lab processes and medical procedures precise, reproducible and compliant. 

 

 Stay unique and make it count.  

Our values - trust, highest standards and ambition - are the cornerstones of our business and provide the framework for Tecan's culture. We foster a positive and empowering environment where our rarest assets, our unique employees, can grow and bring their passion and talent to work.

Marketing Director 100%

Shanghai ,China

Your contribution

Objective

Short term - As an integral part of the sales & marketing team to drive achievement of company targets

Long-term - To develop robust strategic & operational marketing plans to support company

Development and implementation of an effective China business development plan and marketing strategy in close coordination with the global product & strategic marketing and business units

Work with sales leaders to develop and implement business process improvement and operation plan / actions and to develop and execute clear and consistent marketing strategies for products in different market segments / applications

Effectively manage a marketing team consisting of application specialists / managers and Marcom Manager to formulate and drive relevant sales support activities e.g. product demonstrations, presentations, trade shows, product trainings, etc. in daily basis ·

Responsibilities

Definition of market and sales / pricing strategies by customer segments, products and applications in collabo-ration with Global Business Units and local sales leaders to define relevant product and market strategies

Be an important channel to regularly communicate with Global Product & Business teams on local market trends and market needs

Work with sales leaders to develop field sales actions plan for various market segments

Actively involve in the annual budget planning process and mid range strategic planning

Oversee the development and production of marketing communications materials and tools e.g. brochures, advertisements, company website and trade events, etc.

Daily management of the applications team to deliver effective sales support activities in the market

Work with sales leaders on the development of KOL programs and retention of KOLs

Regular report to the company on sales trend / price analysis and recommend actions for improvement

Regular update to the company on market competition development

Set up "new product launch" process and develop effective product launch plan to support new product launches

Be responsible for the business performance of key products in the market. Possessing indepth knowledge about the life science research and diagnostic market segments

Formulation and execution of marketing strategies for key products in the market

Control and efficient use of company resources to support the achievement of sales and operational targets

Provide coaching and supervisions for the team and develop appropriate development programs for key talents

Drives the adoption of value-based selling across teams, ensuring alignment on customer value, and coaching managers and employees to deliver differentiated solutions.

Your background

We’re not just looking for hard skills: We’re looking for people who bring their passion and talent to work.

Master in Life Science subjects with equivalent 7-10 years of relevant experience

Excellent leadership and communication skills

Pre-launch product development skills

Project management skills

Fluent in both verbal and written English

W hat makes working at Tecan unique

The chance to make it count and to have an impact on the world of tomorrow

Working in an international and diverse environment

The chance to grow your career within the company

Feel empowered by our strong and unique company culture

Comprehensive compensation and benefits package

Join Tecan, a great place to work! Read about our recent certification from Great Place to Work.

We’re looking forward to receiving your application online. Please submit your CV or resume (w/o picture and w/o cover letter, reference letters and diplomas are optional).

Only applications that fully meet our requirements will be considered.

jobs.description:
## Descrizione

- 负责银行收付款操作；
- 审核付款单据，包括供应商付款、员工报销，并手工装订少量非电子发票；
- 收集进项税票，与账务核对并上传至税务系统；
- 整理需开具销售发票的数据，并上传至税务系统；
- 负责上述相关资料的电子存档。

At Tecan we are driven to improve people’s lives and health. We do this by empowering our customers to scale healthcare innovation globally from life science to the clinic. We collaborate with our customers from early-stage innovation through project implementation and beyond. We deliver the products, services and solutions that make lab processes and medical procedures precise, reproducible and compliant.

## Stay unique and make it count.

Our values - trust, highest standards and ambition - are the cornerstones of our business and provide the framework for Tecan's culture. We foster a positive and empowering environment where our rarest assets, our unique employees, can grow and bring their passion and talent to work.

jobs.title: Sales Manager -East
jobs.description:
# Mansioni

- Promuovere e vendere i prodotti Tecan
- Scambiare informazioni sulla tecnologia e sulle tendenze del mercato
- Visitare frequentemente i clienti e i rivenditori per fornire formazione sui prodotti e sulle applicazioni
- Collaborare alle attività di vendita generali all'interno del team
- Supportare e gestire l'uso del CRM

# Specialità

- Sviluppare il business con nuovi clienti e nuovi mercati
- Mantenere i clienti esistenti e favorirne la crescita
- Fornire supporto e formazione alle applicazioni per clienti e rivenditori
- Collaborare all'evaluazione e allo sviluppo di nuovi prodotti e strumenti
- Aiutare il team di marketing a raccogliere informazioni sui clienti per agevolare e ottimizzare il processo
- Raggiungere gli obiettivi del team, del gruppo e dell'azienda (insieme ad altri membri del team di gestione)
- Realizzare progetti secondo le regolamentazioni (sicurezza, qualità, metodologia)
- Pianificare e coordinare il lavoro (insieme alle persone coinvolte)
- Risolvere in modo efficiente le attività quotidiane (secondo le regole e le regolamentazioni generali)
- Garantire la qualità del proprio lavoro
- In generale: rispettare le regolamentazioni della competenza Tecan
- Partecipare alle decisioni sui progetti

# Descrizione dell'azienda

Alla Tecan siamo motivati a migliorare la vita e la salute delle persone. Lo facciamo fornendo ai nostri clienti i prodotti, i servizi e le soluzioni che rendono i processi di laboratorio e le procedure mediche precisi, riproducibili e conformi. Collaboriamo con i nostri clienti dalla fase di innovazione iniziale alla implementazione del progetto e oltre. Favoriamo un ambiente positivo e stimolante in cui i nostri rari asset, i nostri dipendenti unici, possono crescere e portare la loro passione e il loro talento al lavoro.

# Valori dell'azienda

I nostri valori - fiducia, standard più elevati e ambizione - sono le fondamenta del nostro business e forniscono la cornice per la cultura della Tecan.

jobs.title: Technical Writer
jobs.description:
Hast du dich jemals gefragt, wie deine Fähigkeiten und dein einzigartiger Hintergrund die Welt von morgen beeinflussen kann? Werde ein Teil unserer Operations Teams und setze das Talent und die Leidenschaft, die dich ausmachen, bei uns ein. 

 Technischer Redakteur (80-100%) 

 Männedorf, Zürich 

 Dein Beitrag 

 In dieser anspruchsvollen und wichtigen Funktion bist du für die zielgruppengerechte Erstellung, Verwaltung und den Unterhalt der technischen Dokumente für die bei Tecan hergestellten Produkte für Endbenutzer, Service- und Produktions-Mitarbeitende verantwortlich. 

 
 Erstellen von Benutzerdokumentationen (vorwiegend in Englisch) wie Operating-, Service- und Software-Manuals 

 Erstellen von Montageanleitungen und Prüfanweisungen für die Herstellung von Produkten 

 Zielgruppengerechte Inhaltserstellung und -pflege im XML-basierten CMS (Schema ST4) und in der DTP-Anwendung (Adobe FrameMaker) 

 Einhalten und Umsetzen von regulatorischen 
• Anforderungen 

 Implementieren dokumentationsrelevanter Inhalte aus der Risikoanalyse 

 Produktfotografie und Bildbearbeitung 

 Erstellen von technischen Illustrationen aus 2D- und 3D-Daten 

 Erstellen oder Redigieren von Texten in Englisch und Deutsch 

 Koordinieren von Übersetzungsaufträgen und Terminologiemanagement 

 
  

 Dein Profil 

 Wir suchen nach Menschen, die ihre Leidenschaft und ihr Talent bei uns umsetzen. 

 
 Du bist eine sprachaffine und exakte Person und hast grossen Spass daran, unterschiedliche Anleitungen zu aktualisieren/erstellen. 

 Du verfügst über mehrjährige Berufserfahrung als Technischer Redakteur oder über ein Studium der Technischen Redaktion samt Berufserfahrung. 

 Du hast gute Kenntnisse im Umgang mit den gängigen DTP-, Illustrations- und  Bildbearbeitungstools (FrameMaker, Photoshop, Illustrator). 

 Du hast gute Kenntnisse im Umgang mit Schema ST4. 

 Du hast gute Kenntnisse im Umgang mit einer gängigen 3D-Illustrations-Software (Creo Illustrate, 3DViaComposer oder vergleichbare Software). 

 Du hast sehr gute Deutsch- (C1 min.) und Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift. 

 Du kannst andere miteinbeziehen, um zu den notwendigen Informationen zu gelangen. 

 Du kannst relevante Informationen herausfiltern und eine zielgruppengerechte Dokumentation aufbereiten, welche regulatorische und firmenspezifische 
• Anforderungen erfüllt. 

 
   Was macht die Arbeit bei Tecan einzigartig? 

 
 Die Chance, etwas zu bewirken und die Welt von morgen mitzugestalten 

 Arbeiten in einem internationalen und vielfältigen Umfeld 

 Spannende Karrieremöglichkeiten 

 Starke und einzigartige Unternehmenskultur 

 Attraktive Vergütung und Sozialleistungen 

 
   

 Werde ein Teil von Tecan, zertifiziert als Great Place to Work! Hier kannst du mehr über unsere Zertifizierung erfahren. Great Place to Work .

 Wir freuen uns auf deine Online-Bewerbung. Für deine Bewerbung benötigen wir nur deinen Lebenslauf (ohne Foto und ohne Motivationsschreiben, Zeugnisse und Diplome sind optional). 

 Wir können nur Bewerbungen berücksichtigen, welche unsere 
• Anforderungen erfüllen. 

 #lifescience #healthcare #automation #medicaldevice #biology #biotechnology #TechnischeDokumentation #Produktedokumentation #Illustrationen #Technikredaktor #Übersetzungsmanagement 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 Our purpose.  

At Tecan we are driven to improve people’s lives and health. We do this by empowering our customers to scale healthcare innovation globally from life science to the clinic. We collaborate with our customers from early-stage innovation through project implementation and beyond. We deliver the products, services and solutions that make lab processes and medical procedures precise, reproducible and compliant. 

 

 Stay unique and make it count.  

Our values - trust, highest standards and ambition - are the cornerstones of our business and provide the framework for Tecan's culture. We foster a positive and empowering environment where our rarest assets, our unique employees, can grow and bring their passion and talent to work.

descriptionByLocale.en:
Have you ever wondered how your skills and unique background can affect the world of tomorrow? Become part of our operations teams and set the talent and passion that make you up with us. Technical Editor (80-100%) Männedorf, Zurich Your contribution In this demanding and important function, you are responsible for the targeted creation, management and maintenance of technical documents for the products manufactured at Tecan for end users, service and production employees. Creating user documentation (mainly in English) such as operating, service and software manuals Creating assembly instructions and test instructions for the production of products Target-oriented content creation and maintenance in the XML-based CMS (Schema ST4) and in the DTP application (Adobe FrameMaker) Keeping and implementing regulatory requirements Implement documentation-relevant content from risk analysis 
• Your profile We are looking for people who implement their passion and talent with us. You are a voice affinity and exact person and have great fun to update/create different instructions. You have several years of professional experience as a technical editor or a study of the technical editors and professional experience. You have good knowledge of the common DTP, illustration and image processing tools (FrameMaker, Photoshop, Illustrator). You have good knowledge of how to deal with Schema ST4. You have good knowledge of using a common 3D illustration software (Creo Illustrate, 3DViaComposer or comparable software). You have very good German (C1 min.) and English skills in word and writing. You can include others to get the necessary information. You can filter out relevant information and prepare targeted documentation that meets regulatory and company-specific requirements. What makes work unique at Tecan? The chance to do something and to help shape the world of tomorrow work in an international and diverse environment Exciting career opportunities Strong and unique corporate culture Attractive remuneration and social benefits Be part of Tecan, certified as Great Place to Work! Here you can learn more about our certification. Great Place to Work . We look forward to your online application. For your application we only need your CV (without photo and without letter of motivation, certificates and diplomas are optional). We can only take into account applications that meet our requirements. #lifescience #healthcare #automation #medicaldevice #biology #biotechnology #Technical Documentation #Product Documentation #Illustrationen #Technicalredaktor #Translation Management Our purpose. We collaborate with our customers from early-stage innovation through project implementation and beyond. We deliver the products, services and solutions that make lab processes and medical procedures precise, reproducible and compliant. Stay unique and make it count. descriptionByLocale.it:
Vi siete mai chiesti come le vostre abilità e background unico possono influenzare il mondo di domani? Entra a far parte dei nostri team operativi e imposta il talento e la passione che ti compongono con noi. Technical Editor (80-100%) Männedorf, Zurigo Il tuo contributo In questa funzione impegnativa e importante, siete responsabili della creazione, gestione e manutenzione mirati di documenti tecnici per i prodotti fabbricati a Tecan per gli utenti finali, i dipendenti del servizio e della produzione. Creazione di documenti utente (principalmente in inglese) come manuali operativi, di servizio e di software Creazione di istruzioni di montaggio e di test per la produzione di prodotti Creazione e manutenzione di contenuti orientati al target nel CMS basato su XML (Schema ST4) e nell'applicazione DTP (Adobe FrameMaker) Mantenere e implementare requisiti normativi Implementare contenuti rilevanti per la documentazione dall'analisi del rischio 
• Stiamo cercando persone che implementano la loro passione e il loro talento con noi. Sei una voce affinità e persona esatta e divertiti ad aggiornare/creare istruzioni diverse. Hai diversi anni di esperienza professionale come editore tecnico o uno studio degli editor tecnici e dell'esperienza professionale. Hai una buona conoscenza dei comuni strumenti di elaborazione DTP, illustrazione e immagine (FrameMaker, Photoshop, Illustrator). Hai una buona conoscenza di come affrontare lo schema ST4. Hai una buona conoscenza dell'utilizzo di un software di illustrazione 3D comune (Creo Illustrate, 3DViaComposer o software comparabile). Hai ottime competenze in tedesco (C1 min.) e inglese in parola e scrittura. È possibile includere altri per ottenere le informazioni necessarie. È possibile filtrare le informazioni pertinenti e preparare la documentazione mirata che soddisfa i requisiti normativi e specifici dell'azienda. Cosa rende il lavoro unico a Tecan? La possibilità di fare qualcosa e di contribuire a plasmare il mondo di domani lavoro in un ambiente internazionale e diversificato Eccitanti opportunità di carriera Cultura aziendale Forte e unica remunerazione attraente e benefici sociali Sii parte di Tecan, certificata come Great Place to Work! Qui potete saperne di più sulla nostra certificazione. Ottimo posto per lavorare. Attendiamo con ansia la vostra applicazione online. Per la vostra applicazione abbiamo solo bisogno del vostro CV (senza foto e senza lettera di motivazione, certificati e diplomi sono facoltativi). Possiamo solo tenere conto delle applicazioni che soddisfano le nostre esigenze. #lifescience #healthcare #automation #medicaldevice #biology #biotechnology #Technical Documentation #Product Documentation #Illustrationen #Technicalredaktor #Translation Management Il nostro scopo. A Tecan siamo spinti a migliorare la vita e la salute delle persone. Lo facciamo dando ai nostri clienti la possibilità di scalare l'innovazione sanitaria a livello globale dalla scienza della vita alla clinica. Collaboriamo con i nostri clienti dall'innovazione del primo stadio attraverso l'implementazione del progetto e oltre. Forniamo prodotti, servizi e soluzioni che rendono i processi di laboratorio e le procedure mediche precise, riproducibili e conformi. Rimanete unici e fatelo contare. I nostri valori - fiducia, standard più elevati e ambiziosi - sono le basi della nostra attività e forniscono il quadro per la cultura di Tecan. Promuoviamo un ambiente positivo e potente in cui i nostri beni più rari, i nostri dipendenti unici, possono crescere e portare la loro passione e talento al lavoro. Ente giuridico:

Avez-vous déjà demandé comment vos compétences et vos antécédents uniques peuvent affecter le monde de demain? Faites partie de nos équipes opérationnelles et établissez le talent et la passion qui vous composent avec nous. Éditeur technique (80-100%) Männedorf, Zurich Votre contribution Dans cette fonction exigeante et importante, vous êtes responsable de la création, de la gestion et de la maintenance ciblées de documents techniques pour les produits fabriqués chez Tecan pour les utilisateurs finaux, les employés de service et de production. Créer de la documentation utilisateur (principalement en anglais) comme les manuels d'exploitation, de service et de logiciel Créer des instructions de montage et des instructions de test pour la production de produits Création et maintenance de contenus axés sur les cibles dans le CMS (Schema ST4) et dans l'application DTP (Adobe FrameMaker) Maintenir et mettre en œuvre les exigences réglementaires Mettre en œuvre du contenu pertinent pour la documentation à partir de l'analyse des risques 
• Votre profil Nous cherchons des gens qui mettent en œuvre leur passion et leur talent avec nous. Vous êtes une affinité vocale et une personne exacte et avez beaucoup de plaisir à mettre à jour/créer différentes instructions. Vous avez plusieurs années d'expérience professionnelle en tant que rédacteur technique ou une étude des rédacteurs techniques et de l'expérience professionnelle. Vous avez une bonne connaissance des outils communs de DTP, d'illustration et de traitement d'image (FrameMaker, Photoshop, Illustrator). Vous avez une bonne connaissance de la façon de traiter avec Schema ST4. Vous avez une bonne connaissance de l'utilisation d'un logiciel d'illustration 3D commun (Creo Illustrate, 3DViaComposer ou un logiciel comparable). Vous avez de très bonnes compétences en allemand (C1 min.) et en anglais en paroles et en écriture. Vous pouvez inclure d'autres pour obtenir les informations nécessaires. Vous pouvez filtrer les informations pertinentes et préparer des documents ciblés qui répondent aux exigences réglementaires et spécifiques de l'entreprise. Qu'est-ce qui rend le travail unique chez Tecan? La chance de faire quelque chose et d'aider à façonner le monde de demain travailler dans un environnement international et diversifié Des opportunités de carrière passionnantes Une culture d'entreprise forte et unique Une rémunération attrayante et des avantages sociaux Faites partie de Tecan, certifié Great Place to Work! Ici vous pouvez en savoir plus sur notre certification. Grand lieu de travail . Nous nous réjouissons de votre candidature en ligne. Pour votre candidature, nous n'avons besoin que de votre CV (sans photo et sans lettre de motivation, les certificats et diplômes sont facultatifs). Nous ne pouvons prendre en compte que les applications qui répondent à nos exigences. #sciences de la vie #santé #automation #médicaldevice #biologie #biotechnologie #Documentation technique #Documentation produit #Illustrationen #Technicalredaktor #Translation Management Notre but. Chez Tecan, nous sommes déterminés à améliorer la vie et la santé des gens. Nous le faisons en donnant à nos clients les moyens d'étendre l'innovation en matière de soins de santé à l'échelle mondiale, depuis les sciences de la vie jusqu'à la clinique. Nous collaborons avec nos clients depuis l'innovation en phase initiale jusqu'à la mise en œuvre de projets et au-delà. Nous fournissons les produits, services et solutions qui rendent les processus de laboratoire et les procédures médicales précis, reproductibles et conformes. Restez unique et faites-le compter. Nos valeurs - la confiance, les normes les plus élevées et l'ambition - sont les pierres angulaires de notre entreprise et constituent le cadre de la culture de Tecan. Nous favorisons un environnement positif et autonomisant où nos atouts les plus rares, nos employés uniques, peuvent grandir et apporter leur passion et leur talent au travail. Personne morale:

 Production Engineer (100%) 

 Männedorf, Schweiz 

  

 Dein Beitrag 

 In dieser vielseitigen Rolle tragen Sie die technische Verantwortung für ein Produkteportfolio während dem Lifecycle-Management. Mit Ihrem technischen Verständnis und Leidenschaft für komplexe Systeme sowie dem Drang nach steter Verbesserung tragen Sie massgeblich dazu bei, dass unsere Produkte stets höchsten Kundenansprüchen genügen. Sie stehen als Schnittstelle im Zentrum zwischen der internen/externen Produktion, Forschung & Entwicklung, Beschaffung, Produkt-Management und Qualitätssicherung. 

 
 Technische Betreuung der zugeteilten Produkte von der Freigabe der Nullserie bis zum Phase-out. 

 Initiierung und Umsetzung von mechanischen, elektronischen oder Softwareänderungen zusammen mit einem Team von Fachexperten. 

 Fehleranalyse und Umsetzung von Verbesserungsmassnahmen 

 Planung und Leitung von Prozess Validierungen in unserer Produktion oder bei Lieferanten. 

 Entwicklung und Planung der benötigten Produktions- und Prüfmittel 

 Prozessbetreuung und -steuerung der zugewiesenen Produktionslinien durch Überwachung der Kennzahlen 

 Sicherstellen der Datenqualität im ERP System für eine reibungslose Auftragsabwicklung 

 Mitarbeit in LCM-Projekten, um die produktionstechnischen Aspekte einzubringen 

 Unterstützung der Qualitätssicherung in technischen Fragen 

 Unterstützung des Einkaufs bei technischen Fragen und Aktivitäten mit Lieferanten und Sub-Lieferanten 

 
  

 Dein Profil 

 
 Motivation und Eigenverantwortung, um unsere Produkte und Produktionsprozesse stetig zu verbessern. 

 Ingenieur Studium (Elektrotechnik, Maschinenbau, Systemtechnik oder Produktionstechnik) oder Techniker/-in HF Elektrotechnik oder Maschinenbau mit mindestens 5 Jahren Berufserfahrung 

 Sehr gute Kenntnisse in Produktionstechnik, -gestaltung und Logistik 

 Berufserfahrung in der regulierten Medizintechnik-/Bio-Pharma, Automatisierungs-, Automobil- und/oder Aviatik-Industrie 

 Sehr gute Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift 

 Nebst fachlicher Expertise sind wir auch auf der Suche nach einer Persönlichkeit, welche durch proaktives Handeln und dem Drang nach stetiger Verbesserung hervorsticht.

Hast du dich jemals gefragt, wie deine Fähigkeiten und dein einzigartiger Hintergrund die Welt von morgen beeinflussen kann? Werde ein Teil unserer Production Team und setze das Talent und die Leidenschaft, die dich ausmachen, bei uns ein.

Production Engineer (100%)

Männedorf, Schweiz

Dein Beitrag

In dieser vielseitigen Rolle tragen Sie die technische Verantwortung für ein Produkteportfolio während dem Lifecycle-Management. Mit Ihrem technischen Verständnis und Leidenschaft für komplexe Systeme sowie dem Drang nach steter Verbesserung tragen Sie massgeblich dazu bei, dass unsere Produkte stets höchsten Kundenansprüchen genügen. Sie stehen als Schnittstelle im Zentrum zwischen der internen/externen Produktion, Forschung & Entwicklung, Beschaffung, Produkt-Management und Qualitätssicherung.

Technische Betreuung der zugeteilten Produkte von der Freigabe der Nullserie bis zum Phase-out.

Initiierung und Umsetzung von mechanischen, elektronischen oder Softwareänderungen zusammen mit einem Team von Fachexperten.

Fehleranalyse und Umsetzung von Verbesserungsmassnahmen

Planung und Leitung von Prozess Validierungen in unserer Produktion oder bei Lieferanten.

Entwicklung und Planung der benötigten Produktions- und Prüfmittel

Prozessbetreuung und -steuerung der zugewiesenen Produktionslinien durch Überwachung der Kennzahlen

Sicherstellen der Datenqualität im ERP System für eine reibungslose Auftragsabwicklung

Mitarbeit in LCM-Projekten, um die produktionstechnischen Aspekte einzubringen

Unterstützung der Qualitätssicherung in technischen Fragen

Unterstützung des Einkaufs bei technischen Fragen und Aktivitäten mit Lieferanten und Sub-Lieferanten

Dein Profil

Motivation und Eigenverantwortung, um unsere Produkte und Produktionsprozesse stetig zu verbessern.

Ingenieur Studium (Elektrotechnik, Maschinenbau, Systemtechnik oder Produktionstechnik) oder Techniker/-in HF Elektrotechnik oder Maschinenbau mit mindestens 5 Jahren Berufserfahrung

Sehr gute Kenntnisse in Produktionstechnik, -gestaltung und Logistik

Berufserfahrung in der regulierten Medizintechnik-/Bio-Pharma, Automatisierungs-, Automobil- und/oder Aviatik-Industrie

Sehr gute Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift

Nebst fachlicher Expertise sind wir auch auf der Suche nach einer Persönlichkeit, welche durch proaktives Handeln und dem Drang nach stetiger Verbesserung hervorsticht.

Was macht die Arbeit bei Tecan einzigartig?

· Die Chance, etwas zu bewirken und die Welt von morgen mitzugestalten

· Arbeiten in einem internationalen und vielfältigen Umfeld

· Spannende Karrieremöglichkeiten

· Starke und einzigartige Unternehmenskultur

· Attraktive Vergütung und Sozialleistungen

Werde ein Teil von Tecan, zertifiziert als Great Place to Work! Hier kannst du mehr über unsere Zertifizierung erfahren. Great Place to Work .

Wir können nur Bewerbungen berücksichtigen, welche unsere 
• Anforderungen erfüllen.

Our purpose.

At Tecan we are driven to improve people’s lives and health. We do this by empowering our customers to scale healthcare innovation globally from life science to the clinic. We collaborate with our customers from early-stage innovation through project implementation and beyond. We deliver the products, services and solutions that make lab processes and medical procedures precise, reproducible and compliant.

Stay unique and make it count.

Our values - trust, highest standards and ambition - are the cornerstones of our business and provide the framework for Tecan's culture. We foster a positive and empowering environment where our rarest assets, our unique employees, can grow and bring their passion and talent to work.

jobs.description:
Ever wondered how your skills and unique background could impact the world of tomorrow? 

  

 Tecan is a pioneer and a globally leading company in laboratory automation and a healthcare enabler. The company is improving people’s lives and health by empowering customers to scale healthcare innovation globally. Tecan enables customers to scale their innovation, whether in laboratory workflows for life science research, various applied markets and diagnostics or in product development and manufacturing for the medical market. Tecan delivers this broad range of healthcare products and services directly to end users or with OEM partners. 

  

 Join our Global Sales Operations Team and shape your career on a global stage. 

   

 Manager Sales Operations IVD & LS Partnering (80- 100%) 

   

 Männedorf, Switzerland 

   

 Your contribution 

 As Manager Sales Operations IVD & LS Partnering you will be responsible for post-contract sales operations by compiling and analyzing sales reports, coordinating pricing and logistics, and ensuring accurate data management in SAP and CRM systems. It also provides user training, troubleshooting, and collaborates with internal teams to maintain efficient sales processes and reporting. 

  

 You will: 

 
 Compile, analyze, and report sales data, budgets, and forecasts using SAP and CRM systems. 

 Coordinate post-contract sales operations, including price adjustments, quote creation, and logistics review. 

 Support and train users on SAP and CRM tools, ensuring accurate data management and troubleshooting issues. 

 Collaborate with internal teams to maintain efficient sales processes and participate in system enhancement projects. 

 Act as a first-line helpdesk for CRM users and manage communication channels for sales operations. 

 Monitor and verify sales allocations and contract implementation, initiating corrective actions as needed. 

 Participate in commercial calls and meetings with customers, supporting the sales team on various commercial topics. 

 
  

  

  

 Your background 

 We’re not just looking for hard skills: We’re looking for people who bring their passion and talent to work. We welcome professionals with practical experience who are eager to build their career in global Sales Operations. You bring: 

  

 
 Minimum 5 years’ experience in sales analytics or sales operations, actively using CRM and SAP business applications. 

 Advanced MS Excel skills (including formulas, macros, and programming) and proficiency in MS Office. 

 Experience working in international environments and as a project team member is an asset. 

 Excellent English required; German and other languages are a plus. 

 Strong communication, teamwork, process orientation, customer focus, and problem-solving skills, with the ability to work under pressure and interact effectively with senior leaders. 

 
   

 W hat makes working at Tecan unique 

 
 You can expect a collegial and supportive team culture built on openness and trust. 

 The chance to make it count and to have an impact on the world of tomorrow 

 
 
 Working in an international and diverse environment 

 The opportunity to grow your career in a company that values both legal excellence and business impact 

 Feel empowered by our strong and unique Tecan culture 

 Comprehensive compensation and benefits package 

 
  

  

  

 Join Tecan, a great place to work! Read about our recent certification from Great Place to Work .

  

 We look forward to receiving your application online. Please submit your CV or resume (without picture and without cover letter; reference letters and diplomas are optional). 

  

 Only applications that fully meet our requirements will be considered. 

  

 #lifescience #healthcare # SalesOperations#CRMJobs #SalesSupport#Teamwork 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 Our purpose.  

At Tecan we are driven to improve people’s lives and health. We do this by empowering our customers to scale healthcare innovation globally from life science to the clinic. We collaborate with our customers from early-stage innovation through project implementation and beyond. We deliver the products, services and solutions that make lab processes and medical procedures precise, reproducible and compliant. 

 

 Stay unique and make it count.  

Our values - trust, highest standards and ambition - are the cornerstones of our business and provide the framework for Tecan's culture. We foster a positive and empowering environment where our rarest assets, our unique employees, can grow and bring their passion and talent to work.

descriptionByLocale.fr: Vous êtes-vous déjà demandé comment vos compétences et vos antécédents uniques pourraient influencer le monde de demain? Tecan fournit cette vaste gamme de produits et services de santé directement aux utilisateurs finaux ou avec des partenaires OEM. Rejoignez notre équipe des opérations commerciales mondiales et façonnez votre carrière sur une scène mondiale. Assistance et formation des utilisateurs sur les outils SAP et CRM, assurant une gestion précise des données et des problèmes de dépannage. Surveiller et vérifier la répartition des ventes et la mise en oeuvre des contrats, en prenant les mesures correctives nécessaires. Participer aux appels commerciaux et aux réunions avec les clients, en appuyant l'équipe de vente sur divers sujets commerciaux. jobs.title: Messtechniker
jobs.description:
## Descrizione

Hast du dich jemals gefragt, come le tue abilità e il tuo background unico possano influenzare il mondo del futuro? Diventa un membro delle nostre squadre di ispezione incoming e metti in pratica il tuo talento e la tua passione con noi.

## Mansioni

- Messtechniker (100%)
- Nänikon, Zürich

## Dein Beitrag

- Come messtechnico, sei un componente essenziale del nostro team e assicuri con la tua conoscenza e la tua consapevolezza della qualità che i nostri prodotti soddisfino le più elevate esigenze.
- Sei la spalla tra l'ingresso delle merci, la produzione e il management della qualità e assicuri che solo parti e componenti impeccabili entrino nella nostra produzione.
- Con il tuo impegno, contribuisci in modo significativo affinché le nostre clienti possano fidarsi della affidabilità e della precisione dei nostri prodotti.

## Attività quotidiane

- Nella tua giornata lavorativa variegata, gestisci e programmatori moderne macchine di misura 3D, esegui misure indipendenti e documenta i risultati con cura.
- Verifichi i componenti, le opzioni e i pezzi di ricambio ricevuti secondo i criteri di qualità stabiliti e analizza i risultati delle misure insieme al team.
- In caso di anomalie, agisci rapidamente e in modo orientato alla soluzione per garantire la qualità dei nostri prodotti.
- Inoltre, ti impegni attivamente nella miglioramento continuo del nostro sistema di management della qualità e supporti la continua miglioramento dei nostri processi.

## Requisiti

- Bedienung e programmazione di macchine di misura 3D (Zeiss GOM, Mitutoyo)
- Pratica e documentazione accurata dei componenti e dei pezzi ricevuti
- Analisi dei risultati delle misure e collaborazione stretta con il team per trovare soluzioni
- Partecipazione attiva alla gestione e allo sviluppo del nostro sistema di management della qualità

## Profilo

- Non cerchiamo solo competenze tecniche: cerchiamo persone che mettano in pratica la loro passione e il loro talento con noi.
- Abilitazione professionale, preferibilmente come automatizzatore, polimecanico o messtechnico (AUKOM)
- Formazione come tecnico della qualità (alternativamente, disponibilità a svolgerla con noi)
- 1+ anno di esperienza lavorativa nella sicurezza della qualità
- Buone conoscenze della lingua tedesca, conoscenze dell'inglese di vantaggio
- Alta consapevolezza della responsabilità e della qualità
- Lavoro affidabile e consequenziale
- Buone capacità di comunicazione, orientamento al team, collaborazione e tolleranza
- Flessibilità, disponibilità a imparare e apertura al nuovo
- Lavoro efficiente e orientato ai risultati

## Cosa offriamo

- La possibilità di fare la differenza e di contribuire al mondo del futuro
- Lavorare in un ambiente internazionale e variegato
- Opportunità di carriera emozionanti
- Cultura aziendale forte e unica
- Pagamento e benefici sociali atraenti

## Contatto

- Siamo felici di ricevere la tua candidatura online. Per la tua candidatura, ci servono solo il tuo curriculum (senza foto e senza lettera di motivazione, diplomi e certificati sono facoltativi).
- Possiamo considerare solo le candidature che soddisfano le nostre richieste.

jobs.title: Associate Consumables Analytics Specialist

titleByLocale.fr: Spécialiste associé en analyse des consommables

jobs.description:
## Associate Consumables Analytics Specialist (80- 100%)

## Descrizione

Ever wondered how your skills and unique background could impact the world of tomorrow? Join our Consumables team and bring your passion and talent to work.

In this important and dynamic role, you will play a key part in driving continuous improvement of our MRP and IBP processes, ensuring they align with Tecan’s group-wide transformation initiatives. As the main point of contact for S/4HANA transition activities within the Consumables team, you will collaborate closely with colleagues and stakeholders to develop and deliver insightful analytics and reports that support decision-making across the Global Consumables Team. Your expertise will help identify and implement supply chain improvements, enhancing our responsiveness, service levels, and cost efficiency. By leveraging your analytical skills and passion for process optimization, you will contribute directly to the ongoing success and innovation of Tecan’s consumables operations.

## Mansioni

- Support and represent Consumables in SAP initiatives (e.g., SAP IBP, S/4HANA).
- Collaborate with the Global Consumables Team and stakeholders to identify and prioritize analytics needs.
- Develop and deliver actionable analytics, ensuring data quality and relevance.
- Assess and recommend improvements for supply chain processes.
- Prepare and support reporting activities and presentations.
- Automate recurring reports and analytics processes to improve efficiency.
- Provide ad-hoc analysis and support to stakeholders as required.
- Document analytics processes and maintain clear records for team use.

## Requisiti

- We’re not just looking for hard skills: We’re looking for people who bring their passion and talent to work.
- Technical or commercial education with advanced training in supply chain or procurement.
- 2+ years’ experience in supply chain or materials management.
- Proficient in SAP R/3, S/4HANA, IBP, and Business Warehouse.
- Advanced skills in Excel and PowerPoint.
- Experience with Power BI (nice to have).
- Good practical experience in the application of AI tools and technologies (nice to have).
- Experience in injection molding (nice to have).
- Strong analytical, communication, and stakeholder management capabilities.
- Independent, assertive, and disciplined with data.
- Fluent in German and English, both written and spoken.
- Customer-focused, collaborative, flexible, and solution-oriented.

## Cosa offriamo

- The chance to make it count and to have an impact on the world of tomorrow.
- Working in an international and diverse environment.
- The chance to grow your career within the company.
- Feel empowered by our strong and unique company culture.
- Comprehensive compensation and benefits package.

## Contatto

- Join Tecan, a great place to work! Read about our recent certification from Great Place to Work.
- We’re looking forward to receiving your application online. Please submit your CV or resume (w/o picture and w/o cover letter, reference letters and diplomas are optional).

Specialista associato in analisi dei materiali di consumo (80-100%) Descrizione Ti sei mai chiesto come le tue competenze e il tuo background unico potrebbero avere un impatto sul mondo di domani? Unisciti al nostro team di materiali di consumo e metti la tua passione e il tuo talento al lavoro. In questo ruolo importante e dinamico, giocherai un ruolo chiave nel promuovere il miglioramento continuo dei nostri processi MRP e IBP, assicurando che siano in linea con le iniziative di trasformazione a livello di gruppo di Tecan. In qualità di principale punto di contatto per le attività di transizione S/4HANA all'interno del team Consumables, collaborerai a stretto contatto con colleghi e parti interessate per sviluppare e fornire analisi e report approfonditi che supportino il processo decisionale in tutto il team Global Consumables. La tua esperienza aiuterà a identificare e implementare miglioramenti nella catena di fornitura, migliorando la nostra reattività, i livelli di servizio e l'efficienza dei costi. Sfruttando le tue capacità analitiche e la passione per l'ottimizzazione dei processi, contribuirai direttamente al successo continuo e all'innovazione delle operazioni di consumo di Tecan. Mansioni - Supportare e rappresentare i materiali di consumo nelle iniziative SAP (ad esempio, SAP IBP, S/4HANA). - Collaborare con il team globale dei materiali di consumo e le parti interessate per identificare e dare priorità alle esigenze di analisi. - Sviluppare e fornire analisi utilizzabili, garantendo la qualità e la pertinenza dei dati. - Valutare e raccomandare miglioramenti per i processi della catena di fornitura. - Preparare e supportare attività di reporting e presentazioni. - Automatizza report ricorrenti e processi di analisi per migliorare l'efficienza. - Fornire analisi ad hoc e supporto alle parti interessate come richiesto. - Documentare i processi di analisi e mantenere registri chiari per l'utilizzo da parte del team. 
• Requisiti - Non cerchiamo solo hard skills: cerchiamo persone che mettono la loro passione e il loro talento nel lavoro. - Formazione tecnica o commerciale con formazione avanzata nella catena di fornitura o negli appalti. - Oltre 2 anni di esperienza nella catena di fornitura o nella gestione dei materiali. - Competente in SAP R/3, S/4HANA, IBP e Business Warehouse. - Competenze avanzate in Excel e PowerPoint. - Esperienza con Power BI (bello da avere). - Buona esperienza pratica nell'applicazione di strumenti e tecnologie di intelligenza artificiale (bello da avere). - Esperienza nello stampaggio a iniezione (bello da avere). - Forti capacità analitiche, di comunicazione e di gestione delle parti interessate. - Indipendente, assertivo e disciplinato con i dati. - Ottima conoscenza della lingua tedesca e inglese, sia scritta che parlata. - Focalizzato sul cliente, collaborativo, flessibile e orientato alla soluzione. 
• Cosa offriamo - La possibilità di farlo valere e di avere un impatto sul mondo di domani. - Lavorare in un ambiente internazionale e diversificato. - La possibilità di far crescere la tua carriera all'interno dell'azienda. - Sentiti potenziato dalla nostra cultura aziendale forte e unica. - Pacchetto completo di compensi e benefici. Contatto - Unisciti a Tecan, un ottimo posto dove lavorare! Leggi la nostra recente certificazione di Great Place to Work. - Non vediamo l'ora di ricevere la tua candidatura online. Si prega di inviare il proprio CV o curriculum (senza foto e senza lettera di presentazione, lettere di referenza e diplomi sono facoltativi).
descriptionByLocale.de:
Associate Consumables Analytics Specialist (80-100 %) Beschreibung Haben Sie sich jemals gefragt, wie Ihre Fähigkeiten und Ihr einzigartiger Hintergrund die Welt von morgen beeinflussen könnten? Werden Sie Teil unseres Consumables-Teams und bringen Sie Ihre Leidenschaft und Ihr Talent ein. In dieser wichtigen und dynamischen Rolle spielen Sie eine Schlüsselrolle bei der kontinuierlichen Verbesserung unserer MRP- und IBP-Prozesse und stellen sicher, dass diese mit den gruppenweiten Transformationsinitiativen von Tecan übereinstimmen. Als Hauptansprechpartner für S/4HANA-Übergangsaktivitäten innerhalb des Consumables-Teams arbeiten Sie eng mit Kollegen und Stakeholdern zusammen, um aufschlussreiche Analysen und Berichte zu entwickeln und bereitzustellen, die die Entscheidungsfindung im gesamten Global Consumables-Team unterstützen. Ihr Fachwissen hilft Ihnen dabei, Verbesserungen in der Lieferkette zu identifizieren und umzusetzen und so unsere Reaktionsfähigkeit, unser Serviceniveau und unsere Kosteneffizienz zu verbessern. Indem Sie Ihre analytischen Fähigkeiten und Ihre Leidenschaft für die Prozessoptimierung einsetzen, tragen Sie direkt zum anhaltenden Erfolg und zur Innovation des Verbrauchsmaterialgeschäfts von Tecan bei. Mansioni – Unterstützung und Vertretung von Verbrauchsmaterialien in SAP-Initiativen (z. B. SAP IBP, S/4HANA). - Arbeiten Sie mit dem Global Consumables Team und Stakeholdern zusammen, um den Analysebedarf zu ermitteln und zu priorisieren. - Entwickeln und liefern Sie umsetzbare Analysen, um die Qualität und Relevanz der Daten sicherzustellen. - Bewerten und empfehlen Sie Verbesserungen für Lieferkettenprozesse. - Bereiten Sie Berichtsaktivitäten und Präsentationen vor und unterstützen Sie diese. - Automatisieren Sie wiederkehrende Berichte und Analyseprozesse, um die Effizienz zu verbessern. - Bereitstellung von Ad-hoc-Analysen und Unterstützung für Stakeholder nach Bedarf. - Dokumentieren Sie Analyseprozesse und führen Sie klare Aufzeichnungen für die Teamnutzung.

Spécialiste associé en analyse des consommables (80-100 %) Description Vous êtes-vous déjà demandé comment vos compétences et votre expérience unique pourraient avoir un impact sur le monde de demain ? Rejoignez notre équipe Consommables et mettez votre passion et votre talent au travail. Dans ce rôle important et dynamique, vous jouerez un rôle clé dans l’amélioration continue de nos processus MRP et IBP, en veillant à ce qu’ils s’alignent sur les initiatives de transformation à l’échelle du groupe Tecan. En tant que point de contact principal pour les activités de transition S/4HANA au sein de l'équipe Consommables, vous collaborerez en étroite collaboration avec vos collègues et parties prenantes pour développer et fournir des analyses et des rapports perspicaces qui soutiennent la prise de décision au sein de l'équipe mondiale Consommables. Votre expertise nous aidera à identifier et à mettre en œuvre des améliorations de la chaîne d’approvisionnement, améliorant ainsi notre réactivité, nos niveaux de service et notre rentabilité. En tirant parti de vos compétences analytiques et de votre passion pour l’optimisation des processus, vous contribuerez directement au succès et à l’innovation continus des opérations de consommables de Tecan. Mansioni - Soutenir et représenter les consommables dans les initiatives SAP (par exemple, SAP IBP, S/4HANA). - Collaborer avec l'équipe mondiale des consommables et les parties prenantes pour identifier et prioriser les besoins en matière d'analyse. - Développer et fournir des analyses exploitables, garantissant la qualité et la pertinence des données. - Évaluer et recommander des améliorations pour les processus de la chaîne d'approvisionnement. - Préparer et soutenir les activités de reporting et les présentations. - Automatisez les rapports et les processus d'analyse récurrents pour améliorer l'efficacité. - Fournir une analyse ad hoc et un soutien aux parties prenantes, selon les besoins. - Documenter les processus d'analyse et conserver des enregistrements clairs pour l'utilisation de l'équipe. 
• Requisiti - Nous ne recherchons pas seulement des compétences techniques : nous recherchons des personnes qui mettent leur passion et leur talent au travail. - Formation technique ou commerciale avec une formation avancée en supply chain ou en achats. - 2+ ans d'expérience en chaîne d'approvisionnement ou en gestion des matériaux. - Maîtrise de SAP R/3, S/4HANA, IBP et Business Warehouse. - Compétences avancées en Excel et PowerPoint. - Expérience avec Power BI (agréable à avoir). - Bonne expérience pratique dans l'application des outils et technologies d'IA (agréable à avoir). - Expérience en moulage par injection (un atout). - Fortes capacités d'analyse, de communication et de gestion des parties prenantes. - Indépendant, assertif et discipliné avec les données. - Maîtrise de l'allemand et de l'anglais, tant écrits qu'oraux. - Axé sur le client, collaboratif, flexible et orienté solution. Cosa ofriamo - La chance de faire en sorte que cela compte et d'avoir un impact sur le monde de demain. - Travailler dans un environnement international et diversifié. - La chance de développer votre carrière au sein de l'entreprise. - Sentez-vous responsabilisé par notre culture d'entreprise forte et unique. - Une rémunération et des avantages sociaux complets. Contatto - Rejoignez Tecan, un endroit où il fait bon travailler ! Découvrez notre récente certification Great Place to Work. - Nous sommes impatients de recevoir votre candidature en ligne. jobs.description:
Hast du dich jemals gefragt, wie deine Fähigkeiten und dein einzigartiger Hintergrund die Welt von morgen beeinflussen kann? Werde ein Teil unserer Production Team und setze das Talent und die Leidenschaft, die dich ausmachen, bei uns ein. 

 Production Engineer (80-100%) 

 Männedorf, Schweiz 

 Dein Beitrag 

 In dieser vielseitigen Rolle tragen Sie die technische Verantwortung für ein Produkteportfolio während dem Lifecycle-Management. Mit Ihrem technischen Verständnis und Leidenschaft für komplexe Systeme sowie dem Drang nach steter Verbesserung tragen Sie massgeblich dazu bei, dass unsere Produkte stets höchsten Kundenansprüchen genügen. Sie stehen als Schnittstelle im Zentrum zwischen der internen/externen Produktion, Forschung & Entwicklung, Beschaffung, Produkt-Management und Qualitätssicherung. 

 
 Technische Betreuung der zugeteilten Produkte von der Freigabe der Nullserie bis zum Phase-out. 

 Initiierung und Umsetzung von mechanischen, elektronischen oder Softwareänderungen zusammen mit einem Team von Fachexperten. 

 Fehleranalyse und Umsetzung von Verbesserungsmassnahmen 

 Planung und Leitung von Prozess Validierungen in unserer Produktion oder bei Lieferanten. 

 Entwicklung und Planung der benötigten Produktions- und Prüfmittel 

 Prozessbetreuung und -steuerung der zugewiesenen Produktionslinien durch Überwachung der Kennzahlen 

 Sicherstellen der Datenqualität im ERP System für eine reibungslose Auftragsabwicklung 

 Mitarbeit in LCM-Projekten, um die produktionstechnischen Aspekte einzubringen 

 Unterstützung der Qualitätssicherung in technischen Fragen 

 Unterstützung des Einkaufs bei technischen Fragen und Aktivitäten mit Lieferanten und Sub-Lieferanten 

 
  

 Dein Profil 

 
 Abgeschlossene Ausbildung als Elektroniker:in oder Mechatroniker:in, idealerweise mit Weiterbildung (z.B. Techniker:in HF oder vergleichbar) 

 Mindestens 3 Jahre relevante Berufserfahrung in der Produktion, idealerweise in der Medizintechnik, Bio-Pharma, Automatisierung, Automobil- oder Aviatikindustrie 

 Sehr gute Kenntnisse in Produktionstechnik, -gestaltung und Logistik 

 Berufserfahrung in der regulierten Medizintechnik-/Bio-Pharma, Automatisierungs-, Automobil- und/oder Aviatik-Industrie 

 Sehr gute Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift 

 Nebst fachlicher Expertise sind wir auch auf der Suche nach einer Persönlichkeit, welche durch proaktives Handeln und dem Drang nach stetiger Verbesserung hervorsticht. 

 
  

 Was macht die Arbeit bei Tecan einzigartig? 

 ·         Die Chance, etwas zu bewirken und die Welt von morgen mitzugestalten 

 ·         Arbeiten in einem internationalen und vielfältigen Umfeld 

 ·         Spannende Karrieremöglichkeiten 

 ·         Starke und einzigartige Unternehmenskultur 

 ·         Attraktive Vergütung und Sozialleistungen 

   

 Werde ein Teil von Tecan, zertifiziert als Great Place to Work!  Hier kannst du mehr über unsere Zertifizierung erfahren.  Great Place to Work . 

   

 Wir freuen uns auf deine Online-Bewerbung. Für deine Bewerbung benötigen wir nur deinen Lebenslauf (ohne Foto und ohne Motivationsschreiben, Zeugnisse und Diplome sind optional). 

 Wir können nur Bewerbungen berücksichtigen, welche unsere 
• Anforderungen erfüllen. 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 Our purpose.  

At Tecan we are driven to improve people’s lives and health. We do this by empowering our customers to scale healthcare innovation globally from life science to the clinic. We collaborate with our customers from early-stage innovation through project implementation and beyond. We deliver the products, services and solutions that make lab processes and medical procedures precise, reproducible and compliant. 

 

 Stay unique and make it count.  

Our values - trust, highest standards and ambition - are the cornerstones of our business and provide the framework for Tecan's culture. We foster a positive and empowering environment where our rarest assets, our unique employees, can grow and bring their passion and talent to work.

jobs.title: Senior IT Data Analyst
jobs.description:
## Descrizione

- Analizzare e visualizzare i dati aziendali per supportare la presa di decisioni
- Sviluppare, ottimizzare e mantenere i modelli e le soluzioni di reporting SAP HANA
- Integrare i dati dai sistemi ERP, CRM, finanziari e altri
- Creare dashboard e KPI in SAP Analytics Cloud; esplorare nuove tool di BI
- Guidare o supportare i progetti di trasformazione digitale e BI
- Assicurare la qualità, la governance e la conformità dei dati (ad esempio, GDPR)
- Fornire supporto di secondo e terzo livello e formazione ai utenti aziendali
- Documentare i flussi di dati, i modelli e le metodologie

## Mansioni

- Analizzare e visualizzare i dati aziendali per supportare la presa di decisioni
- Sviluppare, ottimizzare e mantenere i modelli e le soluzioni di reporting SAP HANA
- Integrare i dati dai sistemi ERP, CRM, finanziari e altri
- Creare dashboard e KPI in SAP Analytics Cloud; esplorare nuove tool di BI
- Guidare o supportare i progetti di trasformazione digitale e BI
- Assicurare la qualità, la governance e la conformità dei dati (ad esempio, GDPR)
- Fornire supporto di secondo e terzo livello e formazione ai utenti aziendali
- Documentare i flussi di dati, i modelli e le metodologie

## Requisiti

- Esperienza estesa come analista dati/BI specialista in SAP HANA
- Buona conoscenza di SAP Datasphere, SAP ERP (S/4), SAP Analytics Cloud, e tool ETL
- Esperienza in modellazione dei dati, SQLScript, e ottimizzazione delle prestazioni
- Comprensione delle strutture dei dati di SAP S4 (FI/CO, MM, SD, PP)
- Eccellenti abilità analitiche, di comunicazione e di gestione dei progetti
- Esperienza diretta in Gestione dei Progetti
- Buona conoscenza dell'inglese; il tedesco è un plus
- Collaboratore con stile di lavoro strutturato e indipendente
- Laurea in business IT, scienza dei dati, o simile è un bene da avere
- Esperienza con OneStream, Salesforce TableauNext, PowerBI sarebbe un plus

## Cosa offriamo

- Un ambiente di lavoro dinamico e stimolante
- L'opportunità di lavorare con un team di professionisti appassionati
- La possibilità di sviluppare le proprie competenze e di crescere professionalmente
- Un ambiente di lavoro positivo e empatico

## Contatto

- Invia la tua candidatura online
- Inserisci il tuo CV o curriculum (senza foto e senza lettera di presentazione, le lettere di riferimento e i diplomi sono facoltativi)

jobs.title: Senior Embedded Software Engineer
jobs.description:
Ever wondered how your skills and unique background could impact the world of tomorrow? Join our Robotics team and bring your passion and talent to work. 

  

 Senior Embedded Software Engineer (80-100%) 

   

 Männedorf, Zürich 

   

 Your contribution 

 As a Senior Embedded Software Engineer, you will design, implement, and test embedded software modules and solutions for liquid handling and robotic applications. You will be involved in planning and developing software concepts, ensuring software quality, and troubleshooting. Your role will require interdisciplinary cooperation with electronics, software, and mechanics teams. 

   

 
• Responsibilities 

 
 Plan, develop, and implement software concepts using modern C++ for embedded systems. 

 Ensure software quality by applying latest tools and through systematic testing and error correction. 

 Collaborate with interdisciplinary teams to integrate software 

 Evaluate new tools and methods and define coding standards and guidelines. 

 Ensure compliance with processes, SOPs, and regulatory standards (IEC 62304, ISO 13485). 

 
  

 Your background 

 We’re not just looking for hard skills: We’re looking for people who bring their passion and talent to work. 

 
 Bachelor's or Master's degree in a technical discipline (e.g. Mechatronics, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering) 

 Strong passion for embedded software engineering 

 At least 5 years of professional experience with state-of-the-art software development using modern C++, preferably C++20 

 Experience with advanced template metaprogramming 

 Experience working with real-time operating systems (RTOS), preferably POSIX-based operating systems 

 Experience with communication interfaces and protocols such as SPI, CAN and QUIC and Ethernet-based protocols (e.g. UDP) 

 Familiarity with technologies and tools such as Protobuf, CMake, Tracealyzer and Docker is a plus 

 Experience in sensing technologies and motor control systems is a plus 

 Strong sense of ownership with the motivation to take responsibility and drive projects to successful completion 

 Good written and spoken English skills; German language skills is a plus 

 
   

 W hat makes working at Tecan unique 

 The chance to make it count and to have an impact on the world of tomorrow 

 
 Working in an international and diverse environment 

 The chance to grow your career within the company 

 Feel empowered by our strong and unique company culture 

 Comprehensive compensation and benefits package 

 
  

 Join Tecan, a great place to work! Read about our recent certification from Great Place to Work .

  

 We’re looking forward to receiving your application online. Please submit your CV or resume (w/o picture and w/o cover letter, reference letters and diplomas are optional). 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 Our purpose.  

At Tecan we are driven to improve people’s lives and health. We do this by empowering our customers to scale healthcare innovation globally from life science to the clinic. We collaborate with our customers from early-stage innovation through project implementation and beyond. We deliver the products, services and solutions that make lab processes and medical procedures precise, reproducible and compliant. 

 

 Stay unique and make it count.  

Our values - trust, highest standards and ambition - are the cornerstones of our business and provide the framework for Tecan's culture. We foster a positive and empowering environment where our rarest assets, our unique employees, can grow and bring their passion and talent to work.

jobs.title: (Senior) Director Service Portfolio & Enablement
jobs.description:
Ever wondered how your skills and unique background could impact the world of tomorrow? Join our Global Service Team and shape your career on the next level. 

   

 (Senior) Director Service Portfolio & Enablement (80-100%) 

   

 Männedorf, Switzerland 

   

 Your contribution 

 As (Senior) Director Service Portfolio & Enablement, you will lead Tecan’s Service Enablement Center of Excellence, empowering our service teams to deliver outstanding, innovative, and commercially successful services. You will drive the design, implementation, and global commercialization of service products—including digital solutions—to differentiate Tecan in the market, maximize customer satisfaction, and contribute to the growth of our Life Sciences and Partnering Businesses. 

  

 
• Responsibilities 

 
 Empower Service Teams:  Equip and support our teams to be effective, efficient, and commercially successful. 

 Develop Strategies & Business Models:  Create and implement strategies and new business models for field service and support, serving both global partnering and life sciences customers. 

 Drive Service Innovation & Digitalization:  Lead the development and global rollout of innovative service products, including digital offerings, aligned with Tecan’s service and digital strategies. 

 Deliver Commercial Impact:  Grow service sales, recurring revenues, and overall profitability by implementing effective enablement strategies and robust product management. Take accountability for the Service Portfolio & Enablement P&L, ensuring revenue generation and profitability for LSB and PB. 

 Oversee Product Training:  Guide the strategic direction and continuous improvement of global product training programs. 

 Enhance Customer Satisfaction:  Make service a key differentiator for Tecan by delivering customer experiences that exceed industry bench marks . 

 Champion Operational Excellence:  Standardize and optimize service processes, tools, and best practices for maximum impact. 

 
 
 Product Training: Oversee the strategic direction and continuous improvement of global product training programs, and 2nd level support teams. 

 
  

 Your background 

 We’re not just looking for hard skills: We’re looking for people who bring their passion and talent to work. We welcome professionals with practical experience who are eager to build their career in Service Enablement. You bring: 

 
 Bachelor’s degree in Life Sciences, Engineering, Sciences, or Economics; MSc or MBA preferred 

 3+ years’ experience in Service Management or capital goods, with proven P&L responsibility 

 Experience in Field Service in Life Sciences, CDx or Biopharma 

 Ability to lead staff with confidence, motivation, decisiveness, flexibility and sound business judgment 

 Experience developing and commercializing service products, including digital offerings 

 International management experience, ideally with global scope 

 Fluent English (verbal and written); German or other languages are a plus 

 Willingness to travel approximately 30% or more for business needs 

 
   

 W hat makes working at Tecan unique 

 The chance to make it count and to have an impact on the world of tomorrow 

 
 Working in an international and diverse environment 

 The chance to grow your career within the company 

 Feel empowered by our strong and unique company culture 

 Comprehensive compensation and benefits package 

 
  

 Join Tecan, a great place to work! Read about our recent certification from Great Place to Work .

  

 We look forward to receiving your application online. Please submit your CV or resume (without picture and without cover letter; reference letters and diplomas are optional). 

  

 Only applications that fully meet our requirements will be considered. 

  

 #LifeSciences #ServiceLeadership #CareerOpportunity #JoinOurTeam #ServiceInnovation #DigitalTransformation #FieldService #GlobalCareers #LeadershipJobs #ServiceExcellence #DiversityAndInclusion #WomenInSTEM #STEMCareers #BiotechJobs #EngineeringJobs #TecanCareers #NowHiring #JobSearch #MakeItCount #WorkAtTecan #CareerGrowth #Empowerment #TeamCulture #CustomerSuccess #ServiceManagement 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 Our purpose.  

At Tecan we are driven to improve people’s lives and health. We do this by empowering our customers to scale healthcare innovation globally from life science to the clinic. We collaborate with our customers from early-stage innovation through project implementation and beyond. We deliver the products, services and solutions that make lab processes and medical procedures precise, reproducible and compliant. 

 

 Stay unique and make it count.  

Our values - trust, highest standards and ambition - are the cornerstones of our business and provide the framework for Tecan's culture. We foster a positive and empowering environment where our rarest assets, our unique employees, can grow and bring their passion and talent to work.

Directeur (Senior) du portefeuille de services et de l'activation (80-100 %) Männedorf, Suisse Votre contribution En tant que directeur (senior) du portefeuille de services et de l'activation, vous dirigerez le centre d'excellence de l'activation des services de Tecan, permettant à nos équipes de service de fournir des services exceptionnels, innovants et commercialement réussis. Vous dirigerez la conception, la mise en œuvre et la commercialisation mondiale de produits de service, y compris des solutions numériques, pour différencier Tecan sur le marché, maximiser la satisfaction des clients et contribuer à la croissance de nos activités de sciences de la vie et de partenariat. Responsabilités Autonomiser les équipes de service : Équiper et soutenir nos équipes pour qu'elles soient efficaces, efficientes et prospères sur le plan commercial. Développer des stratégies et des modèles commerciaux : créer et mettre en œuvre des stratégies et de nouveaux modèles commerciaux pour le service et le support sur le terrain, au service des clients des partenariats mondiaux et des sciences de la vie. Stimuler l'innovation et la numérisation des services : diriger le développement et le déploiement mondial de produits de services innovants, y compris des offres numériques, alignés sur les stratégies de service et numériques de Tecan. Générez un impact commercial : augmentez les ventes de services, les revenus récurrents et la rentabilité globale en mettant en œuvre des stratégies d'habilitation efficaces et une gestion de produits robuste. Assumer la responsabilité du portefeuille de services et des P&L d'activation, en garantissant la génération de revenus et la rentabilité pour LSB et PB. Superviser la formation sur les produits : guider l'orientation stratégique et l'amélioration continue des programmes mondiaux de formation sur les produits. Améliorer la satisfaction client : faites du service un différenciateur clé pour Tecan en offrant des expériences client qui dépassent les références de l'industrie. Champion de l’excellence opérationnelle : standardisez et optimisez les processus de service, les outils et les meilleures pratiques pour un impact maximal. Formation produit : superviser l'orientation stratégique et l'amélioration continue des programmes mondiaux de formation sur les produits et des équipes de support de 2e niveau. Votre parcours Nous ne recherchons pas seulement des compétences techniques : nous recherchons des personnes qui mettent leur passion et leur talent au service de leur travail. Nous accueillons des professionnels possédant une expérience pratique et désireux de bâtir leur carrière dans le Service Enablement. Vous apportez : Un baccalauréat en sciences de la vie, en ingénierie, en sciences ou en économie ; MSc ou MBA, de préférence 3 ans d'expérience en gestion de services ou en biens d'équipement, avec une responsabilité avérée en matière de P&L Expérience dans le service sur le terrain dans les sciences de la vie, CDx ou biopharmaceutique Capacité à diriger le personnel avec confiance, motivation, esprit de décision, flexibilité et bon jugement commercial Expérience dans le développement et la commercialisation de produits de services, y compris des offres numériques Expérience en gestion internationale, idéalement avec une portée mondiale Anglais courant (verbal et écrit) ; L'allemand ou d'autres langues sont un plus La volonté de voyager environ 30 % ou plus pour des besoins professionnels Ce qui rend le travail chez Tecan unique La chance de le faire compter et d'avoir un impact sur le monde de demain Travailler dans un environnement international et diversifié La chance de développer votre carrière au sein de l'entreprise Sentez-vous responsabilisé par notre culture d'entreprise forte et unique Une rémunération et des avantages sociaux complets Rejoignez Tecan, un endroit où il fait bon travailler ! Découvrez notre récente certification Great Place to Work. Nous sommes impatients de recevoir votre candidature en ligne. Veuillez soumettre votre CV (sans photo et sans lettre de motivation ; les lettres de référence et les diplômes sont facultatifs). Seules les candidatures répondant pleinement à nos exigences seront prises en considération. #LifeSciences #ServiceLeadership #CareerOpportunity #JoinOurTeam #ServiceInnovation #DigitalTransformation #FieldService #GlobalCareers #LeadershipJobs #ServiceExcellence #DiversityAndInclusion #WomenInSTEM #STEMCareers #BiotechJobs #EngineeringJobs #TecanCareers #NowHiring #JobSearch #MakeItCount #WorkAtTecan #Croissance de carrière #Empowerment #TeamCulture #CustomerSuccess #ServiceManagement Notre objectif. Chez Tecan, nous sommes déterminés à améliorer la vie et la santé des gens. Nous y parvenons en permettant à nos clients de faire évoluer l’innovation en matière de soins de santé à l’échelle mondiale, des sciences de la vie jusqu’à la clinique. Nous collaborons avec nos clients depuis les premières étapes de l'innovation jusqu'à la mise en œuvre du projet et au-delà. Nous fournissons les produits, services et solutions qui rendent les processus de laboratoire et les procédures médicales précis, reproductibles et conformes. Restez unique et faites en sorte que cela compte. Nos valeurs - confiance, normes les plus élevées et ambition - sont les pierres angulaires de notre entreprise et constituent le cadre de la culture de Tecan. Nous favorisons un environnement positif et responsabilisant où nos atouts les plus rares, nos employés uniques, peuvent se développer et mettre leur passion et leur talent au travail. Personne morale :

jobs.title: Site Manager & Head Operations
jobs.description:
Hast du dich jemals gefragt, wie deine Fähigkeiten und dein einzigartiger Hintergrund die Welt von morgen beeinflussen kann? Werde ein Teil unseres Operations-Teams und setze das Talent und die Leidenschaft, die dich ausmachen, bei uns ein. 

  

 Site Manager & Head Operations (80-100%) 

   

 Männedorf, Zürich 

   

 Dein Beitrag 

 In dieser anspruchsvollen Führungsposition bist du für die fachliche und personelle Leitung des Bereichs Operations verantwortlich. Du stellst die qualitativ hochwertige, termingerechte und kosteneffiziente Herstellung und Lieferung unserer Anlagen und Geräte sicher. Als Site Manager übernimmst du die Gesamtverantwortung für Arbeitssicherheit, Gesundheits- und Umweltschutz sowie das Facility Management an unseren Standorten Männedorf und Nänikon. Du förderst eine Kultur der kontinuierlichen Verbesserung und schaffst ein arbeitsfreundliches Umfeld. 

  

 
 Festlegung und Steuerung der Ziele für Produktion, Einkauf, Planung und Versand 

 Aufbau und Führung eines „best in the industry“ Operations Teams 

 Einführung und Weiterentwicklung von kontinuierlichen Verbesserungsprozessen (KVP) 

 Sicherstellung der Einhaltung von Gesetzen, Normen und internen Vorgaben (ISO 9001, ISO 13485, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, MDSAP) 

 Verantwortung für das Budget und die Ressourcenplanung im Bereich Operations und Facility Management 

 
   

 Dein Profil 

 Wir sind nicht nur auf der Suche nach Fachwissen: Wir suchen nach Menschen, die ihre Leidenschaft und ihr Talent bei uns umsetzen. 

 
 Höhere technische Grundausbildung (FH oder vergleichbar), idealerweise mit Ingenieur-Hintergrund 

 Betriebswirtschaftliche und/oder Produktions-/Logistik-Weiterbildung 

 Mehrjährige Industrie- und Führungserfahrung 

 Fundierte Kenntnisse in Produktion, Materialwirtschaft, Einkauf und Logistik 

 Sehr gute Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse, weitere Sprachen von Vorteil 

 Unternehmerisches Denken, hohe Führungsqualitäten und Teamgeist 

 Belastbarkeit und Durchsetzungsvermögen 

 
   

 Was macht die Arbeit bei Tecan einzigartig? 

 
 Die Chance, etwas zu bewirken und die Welt von morgen mitzugestalten 

 Arbeiten in einem internationalen und vielfältigen Umfeld 

 Spannende Karrieremöglichkeiten 

 Starke und einzigartige Unternehmenskultur 

 Attraktive Vergütung und Sozialleistungen 

 
   

 Werde ein Teil von Tecan, zertifiziert als Great Place to Work! Hier kannst du mehr über unsere Zertifizierung erfahren. Great Place to Work .

  

  

 Wir freuen uns auf deine Online-Bewerbung. Für deine Bewerbung benötigen wir nur deinen Lebenslauf (ohne Foto und ohne Motivationsschreiben, Zeugnisse und Diplome sind optional). 

  

 Wir können nur Bewerbungen berücksichtigen, welche unsere 
• Anforderungen erfüllen. 

   

 #lifescience # healthc are #automation #medicaldevice #biology #biotechnology #operations #management #EHS #facilitymanagement #leadership #engineering 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 Our purpose.  

At Tecan we are driven to improve people’s lives and health. We do this by empowering our customers to scale healthcare innovation globally from life science to the clinic. We collaborate with our customers from early-stage innovation through project implementation and beyond. We deliver the products, services and solutions that make lab processes and medical procedures precise, reproducible and compliant. 

 

 Stay unique and make it count.  

Our values - trust, highest standards and ambition - are the cornerstones of our business and provide the framework for Tecan's culture. We foster a positive and empowering environment where our rarest assets, our unique employees, can grow and bring their passion and talent to work.
